citations.description: Ticket status is `in_progress`; comments list is empty; no attestation of `make lint && make typecheck && make test` passing was recorded.

findings.criterion: `make lint && make typecheck && make test` pass.
findings.detail: This criterion requires running the build commands and observing a passing result. The ticket is still `in_progress`, has no comments, and carries no attestation of a CI run or local make pass. There is no evidence in the repository (no CI artifact, no passing-run record) that satisfies this criterion.
findings.remediation: Run `make lint && make typecheck && make test` locally or in CI, record the outcome (build log URL or summary), and post it as a ticket comment with the commit SHA at which it passed.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
